definitions.text: Bearing full likeness by having precisely the same set of characteristics; indistinguishable.
examples: My car is identical with the one my mom has just bought.

definitions.text: Not different or other; not another or others; not different as regards self; selfsame; numerically identical.
Of twins, sharing the same genetic code.
Something which has exactly the same properties as something else.
A rhyme on the same syllable, such as "leave" and "believe".
